notes:
Ember 1.2.4

• New: Ember can organise your Gmail. Ask it to clean up or sort your inbox and it searches (Gmail's own query syntax), labels/files, archives, stars, marks read/unread, and trashes (recoverable) email for you. Set it up in Settings → Models → Gmail / Email: your Gmail address + a Google App Password (the same one used to send email). It asks before bulk actions or trashing.

Includes 1.2.3's self-update fix + AI safe-open guard, 1.2.2's offline-Ollama tool fix, and 1.2.1's Settings-crash fix.
